title: Config loader crashes on empty YAML file
body:
Loading an empty config.yml raises TypeError instead of falling back to defaults.

Steps:
1. `touch config.yml`
2. `widget start`

---

Expected: defaults applied. Actual: crash.

title: Add --json flag to `widget status`
body: Machine-readable status output for scripting. Should mirror the human output field-for-field.

title: Docs: quickstart still references v1 API
body: docs/quickstart.md shows `widget.connect()` which was removed in v2.
